addRepoDialog.title: Add repository
addRepoDialog.pickCloneDestTitle: Choose where to clone the repository
addRepoDialog.openHint: Pick a repository already cloned on your machine.

tour.welcomeBody: A quick tour of the main features. You can close it any time (Esc).
tour.viewsBody: Branch graph, commits, tree, PRs, issues, docs. (Shortcuts 1–6.)
tour.stackActionsBody: Sync updates, Restack rebases the stack, Undo reverts the last operation. (s / r / u)
tour.newBranchBody: On top of the stack, with an AI-suggested name. (n)
tour.submitBody: Push and open/update PRs; description written by AI. (p)
tour.claudeBody: Chat about the repo, generate messages, review code, guided merge.
tour.stashBody: See what each stash contains, apply it or delete it.
tour.doneBody: Ctrl/⌘ + K for the palette, ? for the shortcuts. The help page recaps everything.

viewGraph.title: Branch graph
viewGraph.body: Here's your stack. Drag a branch onto another to re-parent it; the badges show status (CI, review, behind…).

viewCommits.title: Commit graph
viewCommits.body: The commit DAG. Type here to filter by message / sha / author.

commitSearch.title: Commit search
commitSearch.body: Type: unmatched commits fade out and the view recenters on the results.

commitOps.title: Commit actions
commitOps.body: Click a commit → detail panel: Summary/Detailed, AI Review, cherry-pick, and on hover reword (AI) / split / drop / squash / move.

tree.title: Tree view
tree.body: The stack as a list. Hover a branch for its actions, click it for the detail.

branchOps.title: Branch actions
branchOps.body: Hover a branch → checkout, set parent, restack, merge, track/untrack.

prs.title: Pull requests
prs.body: Open a PR: Approve / Request changes / Comment, CI checks + logs, AI Review (postable as inline comments on the PR).

issues.title: Issues
issues.body: The list of issues and their detail.

sync.title: Sync / Restack / Undo
sync.body: Sync updates, Restack rebases the stack, Undo reverts. Click to try it.

newBranch.title: New branch
newBranch.body: Click to create a branch (AI-suggested name).

submit.title: Submit
submit.body: Push and open/update PRs. Click to see the plan and the AI-written description.

claude.title: AI assistant
claude.body: Click to chat about the repo with Claude.

stash.title: Stashes
stash.body: Here are your stashes: expand to see the files, then Apply / Pop / Drop.

palette.title: Command palette
palette.body: Type a branch, a PR, an action… Enter to run, Esc to close.

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.body: The list of shortcuts (you can also press ?).

footer.toolsMissing: Required tools are missing — click to view

header.submitTitle: Push branches and open/update PRs bottom-up
header.submitUnavailable: Sign in with gh and add a GitHub remote to submit
header.commandLogTitle: Command log: see the git/gh commands the app runs

actions.syncTitle: Sync: fetch + fast-forward the trunk + clean up merged PRs, then restack
actions.restackTitle: Restack the whole stack onto its parents

empty.noRepoBody: Add a git repository to visualize and manage your stacked branches and pull requests.
empty.noRepoBodyClassic: Add a git repository to see your branch stack.

split.title: Split commit
split.introBefore: Check the lines (or whole hunks / files) of the
split.introAfter: commit, bottom of stack; the rest goes into the second. Like
split.noSplittable: No splittable lines (binary / file deletion). Use drop or squash instead.
split.invalidHint: Check at least one line (leave one for the 2nd) and fill in both messages

new.title: New branch
new.suggestTitle: Suggest a name (AI, from your work in progress)

badges.push: local commits not pushed to origin

approval.title: Authorization required
approval.compoundWarning: Compound command (chaining detected). If you authorize it, {{name}} will be prompted to run the commands one at a time — each one must be authorized separately.

commandLogDock.title: Command log
commandLogDock.subtitle: git / gh commands run by the app
commandLogDock.empty: No command yet. Run an action (restack, sync, submit…) — the git/gh commands that run will show up here.

commandPalette.searchPlaceholder: Go to a branch, PR, issue… or run an action

commitPage.cherryPickTitle: Apply this commit on the chosen branch
commitPage.findings: {{count}} finding(s) — annotated in the diff, badged in the tree.

conflictPanel.title: Restack paused — resolve conflicts

description.before: Fix the conflicts in your editor and stage them (
description.after: ), then continue — or let the AI propose a resolution per file.

resolveAll.title: Suggest and apply a resolution for every conflicted file
resolveAll.label: AI resolve all ({{count}})

suggest.title: Ask the AI to resolve this file
suggest.label: AI suggest

conflictPanel.markersWarning: The proposal still contains conflict markers — review manually before applying.
conflictPanel.markersLeftError: AI left conflict markers — resolve this one manually.

apply.title: Write this resolution and stage the file
apply.label: Apply

git.desc: Essential: all operations on branches, commits and the stack.

gh.desc: Pull requests, issues, CI checks and Submit.

intro.before: gitui relies on these command-line tools. Install the ones that are missing, then click

dependencyGate.claudeNote: (AI aides) is checked when you launch an AI feature — no need to install it for the rest of the app.

auth.title: GitHub CLI not signed in
auth.hint: Sign in to access PRs and issues. Run this command in a terminal:

diffExplorer.noTextDiff: No text diff for this file (binary or rename).
diffExplorer.selectFile: Select a file on the left.

digestBanner.header: Since your last visit · {{count}} new item(s)

docsView.emptyState: Select a .md file, or create a new one.

helpPage.testTitle: Launch a guide to try this feature

intro.middle2: next to a feature to see it in action in the app, or

branchGraph.name: Branch graph
branchGraph.desc: the stack tree; drag one branch onto another to re-parent it

commitGraph.name: Commit graph
commitGraph.desc: the commit DAG, with search and filter

tree.name: Tree
tree.desc: the stack as a list, with per-branch actions

prs.name: Pull requests
prs.desc: list and detail, review, CI checks

newBranch.name: New branch
newBranch.desc: at the top of the stack (name suggested by AI ✨)

branchOps.name: checkout / Set parent / Track / Untrack
branchOps.desc: manage the place in the stack

restack.name: Restack
restack.desc: rebase a branch onto its parent

merge.name: Merge
merge.desc: merge two branches via the assistant

split.name: Split
split.desc: split a commit in two, by file

cherryPick.name: Cherry-pick
cherryPick.desc: apply a commit onto another branch

submit.name: Submit
submit.desc: push and open/update the PRs (AI description ✨)

undo.name: Undo
undo.desc: undo the last operation that rewrites history

viewContent.name: View content
viewContent.desc: the file list of each stash

summaryDetailed.name: Summary / Detailed
summaryDetailed.desc: analysis of a commit or a PR

askClaude.name: Ask Claude
askClaude.desc: free chat about the whole repo

mergeHelp.name: Merge help
mergeHelp.desc: guides the merge with command approval

resolveConflicts.name: Resolve conflicts
resolveConflicts.desc: AI suggestion per file, or all at once (during restack)

digest.name: Digest
digest.desc: a "since your last visit" summary on open

ciChecks.name: CI checks
ciChecks.desc: see each check, open its logs; completion notification

badges.name: Badges
badges.desc: PR, CI, review, ahead/behind state — at a glance

commandPalette.name: Command palette
commandPalette.desc: Ctrl/⌘ + K: go somewhere or run an action

commitSearch.name: Commit search
commitSearch.desc: filter the graph by message / sha / author

aiBackend.name: AI backend
aiBackend.desc: Claude (Anthropic cloud) or Ollama (free local models)

actions.mergeTitle: Merge this PR directly (gh pr merge), then resync the stack

review.postTitle: Post this review on the PR: inline comments + summary, in “comment” mode

stackedWarning.after: . In a stack, merge the parent PRs first.

merge.ciWarning: CI failed or review missing — GitHub may refuse the merge.

squash.label: Squash
squash.hint: a single commit on the trunk (recommended for a stack)

rebase.label: Rebase
rebase.hint: replays the commits on the base

deleteBranch.label: Delete the remote branch after the merge
deleteBranch.hint: Leave unchecked while child PRs are stacked on this branch.

repoGraphView.empty: Add repositories to see the links between them.

general.languageHint: By default, the app follows your machine's language. Applies immediately.
general.appearanceHint: Applies immediately. The classic theme stays available at any time.
general.pollIntervalHint: How often gitui checks for commits, PRs and issues. Minimum 30s.

assistantUi.label: Assistant interface (Summary / Detailed)
assistantUi.hint: Chat talks to Claude without showing the terminal. In chat mode, merges ask for approval before each command that writes.

anthropic.modelHintPost: ) or full name. Empty = your Claude account's default model.

ollama.noModels: No model — `ollama pull qwen3-coder` (local) or `ollama launch claude` (cloud).
ollama.hintMid: CLI is still required (it's the engine); Ollama just provides the model — local (

about.intro: Documentation, interactive guide and environment check.
about.help: Everything the app does — and interactive guide
about.checkTools: Check the tools (git, gh, Claude Code)

shortcutsHelp.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcutsHelp.views: View: graph · commits · tree · PRs · issues · docs
shortcutsHelp.singleKeyNote: Single-key shortcuts are ignored while typing in a field.

submitDialog.title: Submit stack
submitDialog.nothingToSubmit: Nothing to submit — no tracked branches.
submitDialog.describeTitle: Generate title + description (AI, from the branch commits)

stack.title: Visualize & reorganize your stack
stack.desc: Branch tree, drag-and-drop to re-parent, commit graph.

restack.title: Restack · Sync · Submit
restack.desc: Cascading rebase, fast-forward, push + open/update GitHub PRs — and Undo.

ai.title: AI helpers
ai.desc: Commit messages, PR descriptions, reviews, conflict resolution, guided merges, chat.

daily.title: Day to day
daily.desc: PR review, CI checks, stashes, commit search, Ctrl/⌘ + K palette.

intro.title: Welcome to gitui
intro.lead2: (stacked PRs) tool, local and free — Graphite-style. Visualize your branch tree,
intro.lead3: in cascade, and open/update your GitHub PRs.

ai.heading: Enable the AI features
ai.lead1: The AI helpers run through the CLI
ai.lead2: For the best experience, install one of the two — your choice:

claude.title: Claude Code (cloud)
claude.desc: With your Anthropic account — Claude models.

ollama.title: Ollama (local & free)
ollama.desc: Local or Ollama cloud models, no Anthropic account.

ai.note1: You can pick the engine and model in
